evals.prompt: Review this GitHub Actions workflow for security vulnerabilities. The file is at gha-validator-workspace/test-insecure.yml
evals.expected_output: Should identify: unpinned actions, branch ref action (@main), script injection (${{ github.event }}), unrestricted pull_request_target, hardcoded token, write-all permissions, self-hosted runner, missing timeout-minutes, missing workflow name, missing permissions. Score should be below 45 (F grade)

evals.prompt: Analyze this CI workflow and suggest improvements. The file is at gha-validator-workspace/test-mixed.yml
evals.expected_output: Should identify: unpinned actions (semver tags not SHAs), unnamed run steps, duplicate step name, missing timeout-minutes, inconsistent uses: quoting, missing continue-on-error on curl step. Score should be in 55-75 range
